phrases.intent_en: Ask where the best viewpoint of the château from the riverbank is
phrases.text_local: Quel est le meilleur point de vue sur le château depuis les berges ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel ay luh may-YUR PWAN duh VOO soor luh shah-TOH duh-PWEE lay BAIRZH
phrases.cultural_note: The south bank of the Loire opposite Amboise provides a classic postcard view of the Château Royal rising above the town.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to cycle along the Loire
phrases.text_local: Où puis-je commencer le circuit cyclable au bord de la Loire ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo PWEE-zhuh koh-mahn-SAY luh seer-KWEE seek-LABL oh BOR duh lah LWAR
phrases.cultural_note: The Loire à Vélo cycling route passes through Amboise and is one of the most scenic stretches of the 800 km Loire Valley bike path.

responses.english: The entrance is located near the SNCF train station.
responses.phonetic: OO pwee zhuh koh-mAHNSS luh seer-kwee SEE-kla-bl oh bor duh lah LWAHR
responses.local: L'entrée se trouve près de la gare SNCF.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a riverside walking path
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un chemin de promenade le long des berges ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL un shuh-MAN duh proh-muh-NAD luh LON day BAIRZH
phrases.cultural_note: A levée (embankment path) follows the Loire through Amboise, offering pleasant walks with views of the river, the island, and the château.

responses.english: Yes, an embankment path follows the Loire through Amboise.
responses.phonetic: Yah-TEEL uhn sheuh-MAN duh PROH-muh-nahd oh BOR duh lah LWAHR
responses.local: Oui, une levée longe la Loire à travers Amboise.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about sunset views along the river
phrases.text_local: Quel est le meilleur endroit pour regarder le coucher de soleil sur la Loire ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel ay luh may-YUR ahn-DRWA poor ruh-gar-DAY luh koo-SHAY duh soh-LAY soor lah LWAR
phrases.cultural_note: The Loire Valley is a UNESCO World Heritage Site partly for its exceptional light; sunsets along the river at Amboise are particularly dramatic, with the château silhouetted above.

responses.english: At Loire Valley Location, Conception street.
responses.phonetic: OO pwee zhuh LWAY uhn VAY-loh
responses.local: Chez Loire Valley Location, rue de la Conception.
